items.reasoning: Lane sustain against Illusory Orb + Boulder Smash harass from two mobile heroes.
+2 damage for mid CS; instant heal survives a level 2 Rolling Boulder combo.
+3 INT for Shadow Strike harass damage; QoP wants to trade aggressively.
Cheap stats; double branch + circlet for early Null Talisman.
Blink gives QoP rune control advantage over Puck. Refill between trades.
INT treads for mana-efficient Shadow Strike harass; STR treads when Earth Spirit ganks.
INT efficiency for spell spam. QoP needs mana for Blink + Scream + Strike combos.
Slow on attack procs after Blink-in; 40 INT + 100 projectile damage. Keeps up with tempo.
Sonic Wave 70s->40s CD, 40% spell amp during Fear effect. QoP out-tempos both heroes.
3.5s hex locks Puck before Phase Shift or Earth Spirit before Rolling Boulder escape.
Double Sonic Wave deals 1200+ magic damage after reductions. Fights end instantly.
AoE slow catches both mobile heroes; armor counters Earth Spirit physical damage.
If Waning Rift silence + Magnetize combo chains, BKB prevents lockdown.
Blocks Earth Spirit Boulder Smash targeting; mana regen for Blink rotations.

recommendation.overall_strategy: Match Puck and Earth Spirit's tempo with QoP's natural mobility advantage. Blink gives free rune control and gank dodging. Witch Blade into Aghs creates a mid-game power spike that out-damages both tempo controllers. Hex in late game prevents their escape mechanics entirely.
